shop.products.coaster_oak.title: Oak Coasters - Set of 4

shop.products.coaster_live_edge.descript: Unique coaster preserving the natural shape of the wood. Each piece is one of a kind.

shop.products.frame_oak_small.descriptio: Minimalist frame made of light oak wood. Ideal for photos and small prints.

shop.products.frame_walnut_large.descrip: Elegant frame made of dark walnut. Perfect for family photos and portraits.

shop.products.frame_collage.description: Multi-photo frame made of light ash wood. Ideal for displaying photo series or collages.
shop.products.deco_tree_slice.title: Decorative Wood Slice
shop.products.deco_tree_slice.descriptio: Natural wood slice - perfect as a trivet, wall decoration, or composition element. Engraving available.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Discover the story of Enchanted in Wood
about.story.title: Our Passion
about.story.content: Enchanted in Wood is a family craft that combines tradition with modern design. Each of our products is handmade with attention to every detail. We use only wood from Polish, sustainable sources. We believe that everyday objects can be beautiful and durable - that's why we create things that last for generations.
about.commitment.title: Our Values
about.commitment.content: We prioritize quality over quantity. Each product passes through our hands multiple times - from selecting the wood, through processing, to the final finish. We use natural oils and waxes, safe for health and the environment.
contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have questions? Want to order a custom product? Write to us!
